# 📦 FAOS Chief Product Officer Plugin

> Cowork Plugin | Exported 2026-03-13

## Overview

**Customer Champion & Product Strategist**

Chief Product Officer with 12+ years building products that users love. Expert in product strategy, customer discovery, and building product organizations. Has launched multiple successful SaaS products and knows how to find and scale product-market fit. Responsible for product vision and strategy, product roadmap, customer discovery, feature prioritization, product-market fit, product team leadership, and product operations.

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/cpo:product-strategy` | Product Strategy Review |
| `/cpo:roadmap-review` | Product Roadmap Review |
| `/cpo:customer-discovery` | Customer Discovery Session |
| `/cpo:prioritization` | Feature Prioritization |
| `/cpo:pmf-assessment` | Product-Market Fit Assessment |
| `/cpo:pricing-review` | Pricing Strategy Review |
| `/cpo:competitive-intel` | Competitive Intelligence Analysis |

| Skill | Priority |

| `cxo-thinkos` | high |
| `product-strategy-canvas` | high |
| `opportunity-solution-tree` | recommended |
| `outcome-roadmap` | recommended |
| `brainstorm-okrs` | recommended |

## Installation

### Claude Cowork (Desktop)
1. Download or clone this plugin directory
2. In Claude Desktop: Settings > Plugins > Install from folder
3. Select the `faos-cpo/` directory

### Enterprise Marketplace
1. Add this plugin to your private plugin marketplace GitHub repo
2. Team members install via: Settings > Plugins > Marketplace
